items.title: Democrats Say FEMA Official Who Has Claimed to Be Teleported Is ‘Unfit’ for Role
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Zimbabwe says 15 nationals killed after being lured to fight for Russia
items.dek: Zimbabwe says it is engaging the Russian government to repatriate bodies and bring home those still alive.
items.body: Zimbabwe says it is engaging the Russian government to repatriate bodies and bring home those still alive.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: New India bill to amend transgender rights sparks protests
items.dek: The bill seeks to change how transgender people are legally recognised and their right to self-identify.
items.body: The bill seeks to change how transgender people are legally recognised and their right to self-identify.
items.author: IriLine Desk
